companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Company names or domains to search (e.g. "Salesforce", "hubspot.com"). You can enter multiple.

maxReviews.title: Max reviews per company
maxReviews.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per company. Up to 500.

minRating.title: Minimum star rating
minRating.description: Only collect reviews at or above this rating (1–5). Leave blank for all ratings.

trustpilotApiKey.title: Trustpilot API key (optional)
trustpilotApiKey.description: Free API key from developers.trustpilot.com. Gives more structured data. If omitted the page is scraped directly — still works.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies are used by default.
